title: epicranthes hexarhopalon
intro: Epicranthes hexarhopalon, also known as the 'Yellow Pothos', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. Its health benefits include treating respiratory issues, skin irritations, and wounds, as well as providing relief from fever and pain. Herbal preparations of Epicranthes hexarhopalon include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
